notes: 1.0.33: LIVE display settings + banner fix. Settings now send to the display AS you change each value (debounced ~300ms, one paced command) - no Apply needed; the Apply button re-syncs everything at once. Fixed success confirmations (serial set, settings sent) that were wrongly rendered as a red Error banner - they now show a green OK. Verified the display stays connected with ZERO resets when the port isn't contended (the earlier unnecessary restarts were serial-port contention, not the display firmware).
